pokemon:unfezant.name: Unfezant
pokemon:unfezant.summary: Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves feel close to anyone other than their Trainers.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves feel close to anyone other than their Trainers.
Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females’ flying abilities surpass those of the males.
Males swing the plumage on their heads to threaten others, but females are better at flying.
Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females’ flying abilities surpass those of the males.
This Pokémon is intelligent and intensely proud. People will sit up and take notice if you become the Trainer of one.
Unfezant are exceptional fliers. The females are known for their stamina, while the males outclass them in terms of speed.
Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves feel close to anyone other than their Trainers.
Males swing the plumage on their heads to threaten others, but females are better at flying.
Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females’ flying abilities surpass those of the males.
Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves feel close to anyone other than their Trainers.

loreSummary: Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves feel close to anyone other than their Trainers.

pokemon:pidove.name: Pidove
pokemon:pidove.summary: These Pokémon live in cities. They are accustomed to people. Flocks often gather in parks and plazas.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: These Pokémon live in cities. They are accustomed to people. Flocks often gather in parks and plazas.
Each follows its Trainer’s orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.
This very forgetful Pokémon will wait for a new order from its Trainer even though it already has one.
This very forgetful Pokémon will wait for a new order from its Trainer even though it already has one.
It’s forgetful and not very bright, but many Trainers love it anyway for its friendliness and sincerity.
Where people go, these Pokémon follow. If you’re scattering food for them, be careful— several hundred of them can gather at once.
These Pokémon live in cities. They are accustomed to people. Flocks often gather in parks and plazas.
This very forgetful Pokémon will wait for a new order from its Trainer even though it already has one.
This very forgetful Pokémon will wait for a new order from its Trainer even though it already has one.
These Pokémon live in cities. They are accustomed to people. Flocks often gather in parks and plazas.

pokemon:tranquill.name: Tranquill
pokemon:tranquill.summary: No matter where in the world it goes, it knows where its nest is, so it never gets separated from its Trainer.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: No matter where in the world it goes, it knows where its nest is, so it never gets separated from its Trainer.
It can return to its Trainer’s location regardless of the distance separating them.
No matter where in the world it goes, it knows where its nest is, so it never gets separated from its Trainer.
Many people believe that, deep in the forest where Tranquill live, there is a peaceful place where there is no war.
These bright Pokémon have acute memories. Apparently delivery workers often choose them as their partners.
It can fly moderately quickly. No matter how far it travels, it can always find its way back to its master and its nest.
Many people believe that, deep in the forest where Tranquill live, there is a peaceful place where there is no war.
No matter where in the world it goes, it knows where its nest is, so it never gets separated from its Trainer.
